tasks.task: Register for a new account using a valid email address and password.

success_criteria.completion_indicator: User is successfully redirected to the Mission Dashboard after registration.

potential_friction: Unclear password requirements, error messages, slow loading times.

tasks.task: Log in to the app using the credentials created during registration.

success_criteria.completion_indicator: User is successfully redirected to the Mission Dashboard after login.

potential_friction: Incorrect credentials error message, forgotten password flow issues, slow loading times.

success_criteria.completion_indicator: User is successfully redirected to the Mission Dashboard after authenticating with Google.

potential_friction: Permissions requests, Google account selection issues, error messages, redirection loops.

success_criteria.completion_indicator: User is successfully redirected to the Mission Dashboard after authenticating with Facebook.

potential_friction: Permissions requests, Facebook account selection issues, error messages, redirection loops.

success_criteria.completion_indicator: User is successfully redirected to the Mission Dashboard after authenticating with GitHub.

potential_friction: Permissions requests, GitHub account selection issues, error messages, redirection loops.

tasks.task: Navigate to the Mission Dashboard and identify the key elements.

success_criteria.completion_indicator: User can identify and describe the purpose of the key elements (e.g., mission list, progress bar, filters).

potential_friction: Unclear labeling, confusing layout, overwhelming amount of information.

tasks.task: Try to register with an invalid email format (e.g., missing @ symbol).

success_criteria.completion_indicator: App displays a clear and informative error message indicating the invalid email format.

potential_friction: Vague error messages, no error message displayed, page crash.

tasks.task: Try to log in with an email address that is not registered.

success_criteria.completion_indicator: App displays a clear and informative error message indicating the email address is not registered.

potential_friction: Vague error messages, no error message displayed, page crash.
